name: io.github.crawde/xmorf
description: MCP server for xmorf — AI image editing and generation. 3 tools: edit images with 8 AI models (standard, enhance, upscale, shadow, kiss, skin, angles, scene), generate images from text, and list available models.

environmentVariables.description: Your xmorf API bearer token from xmorf.com
environmentVariables.name: XMORF_API_TOKEN
